## Social preview

### Bluesky

Enabled: true

CodeGrind's onboarding just got a major upgrade! Dive into a cyberpunk Tower Defense game from day one, merging competitive gameplay with DSA learning. See how we transformed new user experience: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/05/04/codegrind-tower-defense-onboarding-ux/

### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

We're excited to share a significant update to CodeGrind's onboarding flow! New users now begin their journey with an integrated Tower Defense game, moving beyond traditional problem lists. This approach merges competitive gameplay with structured Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) learning, aiming to boost engagement and learning outcomes from the start. Our new flow includes a reveal sequence, language and tower slot selection tied to learning, and guided gameplay. We've also implemented state management to ensure progress is saved across sessions. Learn more about the design and technical decisions behind this innovative onboarding experience: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/05/04/codegrind-tower-defense-onboarding-ux/
